title: Rich Grassy Spanish Cheese Lasagna
description: A comforting, cheese-pull Spanish dish featuring chopped onion and double-rise-bread, perfect for a sick day, made with ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked onion and garlic, chopped spinach, and shredded manchego cheese.
In a separate bowl, combine the cubed double-rise-bread and chopped basil.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of tomato sauce.
Add a layer of the bread and basil mixture on top of the sauce.
Add a layer of the cheese and spinach mixture on top of the bread.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
